[*]: The values of: "service level.[0]". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "service level.[0]". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
activation_state: The values of: "timers" & "activation state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "timers" & "activation state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
active_warnings_in_instrument_cluster_00: Information about the warning lights being actived in the instrument cluster (001)
Information about the warning lights being actived in the instrument cluster filtered (001)
active_warnings_in_instrument_cluster_fe: Information about the warning lights being actived in the instrument cluster filtered (FEFF)
active_warnings_in_instrument_cluster_ff: Information about the warning lights being actived in the instrument cluster filtered (FFF)
actual_pressure: The values of: "tires" & "actual pressure". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "tires" & "actual pressure". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
additional_comfort_consumption: Additional comfort consumption for a given driving mode (comfort- related).
amount_of_energy: Amount of used energy in bidirectional charging mode
amount_of_energy_threshold: Amount of used energy in bidirectional charging mode threshold
auto_unlock_ac: Possible values: AUTO_UNLOCK_AC_INVA LID , AUTO_UNLOCK_AC_OFF , AUTO_UNLOCK_AC_PER MANENT , AUTO_UNLOCK_AC_ONC E. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile options.auto unlock ac". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
average_Speed: The float value of "long trip trip data average Speed"
average_Speed_unit: The string value of "long trip trip data average Speed unit"
average_electr_engine_consumption: The float value of "long trip trip data average electr engine consumption"
average_electr_engine_consumption_unit: The string value of "long trip trip data average electr engine consumption unit"
average_electric_engine_consumption: The float value of "long trip average electric engine consumption"
average_fuel_consumption: The float value of "long trip trip data average fuel consumption"
average_fuel_consumption_unit: The string value of "long trip trip data average fuel consumption unit"
average_gas_consumption: The float value of "long trip average gas consumption"
average_speed: The float value of "long trip average speed"
battery_charging_status_soc: Indicates the current charging status for the battery
battery_climatization_consumption: Energy consumption for battery climtization for a given driving mode (non- comfortrelated).
bcam_activation: Possible values: BCAM_ACTIVATION_INVA LID, BCAM_ACTIVATION_ACTI VATED, BCAM_ACTIVATION_DEA CTIVATED
bcam_notification: Possible values: BCAM_NOTIFICATION_IN VALID, IMMEDIATE_CHARGING_S OC_RESET_IN_NEXT_CHA RGING_PROCESS, IMMEDIATE_CHARGING_ NOTIFY_BCAM_IS_OFF, EXTENDED_CHARGING_S OC_RESET_IN_NEXT_CHA RGING_PROCESS, EXTENDED_CHARGING_N OTIFY_BCAM_IS_OFF, BCAM_SCORE_VALUE_W ARNING, BCAM_SCORE_VALUE_RE ACHED
bcam_score: Score value indicates the use of the battery charging care mode
bcam_score_threshold: Threshold up to which the battery charging care mode was used in an exemplary manner
bem_alert_time: Delay after activation of the BEM2 pre-warning (12v battery BEM -level 2 )
bem_level: BEM (Battery Energy Management) Level for auxiliary battery
bidi_max_Soc: Additional SOC range for bidirectional charging from maxSoc to greater than maxSoc. Setting is profile independet
bidi_min_Soc: Additional SOC range for bidirectional charging from less than minSoc to minSoc. Setting is profile independet.
calibration_failure_reason: The enum value of "calibration failure reason"
calibration_need_detected: The enum value of "calibration need detected"
calibration_request_escalation_1: Notification: First escalation request for a battery calibration. Possible values: Possible values: CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ UNDEFINED, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ NONE, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ ACTIVE, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ ACK, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ REJECT
calibration_request_escalation_2: Notification: Second escalation request for a battery calibration. Possible values: Possible values: CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ UNDEFINED, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ NONE, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ ACTIVE, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ ACK, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ REJECT
calibration_request_initial: Notification: Initial request for a battery calibration. Possible values: Possible values: CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ UNDEFINED, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ NONE, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ ACTIVE, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ ACK, CALIBRATION_REQUEST_ REJECT
calibration_request_method: Notifiaction: User can select one of the given calibration methods. Possible values: CALIBRATION_REQ_METH OD_UNDEFINED, CALIBRATION_REQ_METH OD_NONE, CALIBRATION_REQ_METH OD_FULL_CHARGE_RELA X, CALIBRATION_REQ_METH OD_FULL_CHARGE_AC60 , CALIBRATION_REQ_METH OD_FULL_CHARGE_AC95
capacity_measurement_data: Indicates the tank capacity in percentage
car_captured_time: The timestamp when the ICAS1 (Java service in the car) has sent the report to the --> OCU --> DP
car_captured_timestamp: The string value of "long trip car captured timestamp"
car_captured_utc_timestamp: Date and time when the report has been created, represented by the number of seconds that have elapsed since 00:00:00 Thursday, 1 January 1970.
charge_bcam_threshold: Charge threshold of battery charging care mode where the targetSoc is set to in case the BCCM is activated
charge_bulk_threshold: The int value of "battery state report charge bulk threshold"
charge_energy: Informs about the charged energy in kWh with a range between 0 and 1000kWh
charge_mode: Informs about the charge mode. Possible values: CHARGE_MODE_INVALID, CHARGE_MODE_IMMEDI ATELY_STOPPED, CHARGE_MODE_IMMEDI ATELY_DEFAULT, CHARGE_MODE_IMMEDI ATELY_PROFILE, CHARGE_MODE_EXTEND ED_PROFILE, CHARGE_MODE_EXTEND ED_STOPPED
charge_mode_selection: CHARGE_MODE_SELECTI ON_INVALID, CHARGE_MODE_SELECTI ON_TIMERCHARGING, CHARGE_MODE_SELECTI ON_IMMEDIATECHARGIN G, CHARGE_MODE_SELECTI ON_TIMER_CHARGING_C LIMATIZATION, CHARGE_MODE_SELECTI ON_PREFERRED_CHARGI NG_TIMES,CHARGE_MOD E_SELECTION_ONLY_OW N_CURRENT, CHARGE_MODE_SELECTI ON_IMMEDIATE_DISCHAR GING, CHARGE_MODE_SELECTI ON_HOME_STORAGE_CH ARGING
charge_option: if the parameter is true, the timer is programmed for charging. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "timers" & "charge option". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
charge_power: Informs about the actual charge power to the hv battery kW range between 0 and 500 with a resolution of 0,1 kW possible restrictionReason invalid
charge_rate: Informs about the actual rate of the charging process based on the average energy comsumption for driving range between 0 and 3000 with a resolution of 0,1 possible restrictionReason- invalid possible speedUnitskm per min km per hour,miles per min,miles per hour
charge_rate_unit: CHARGE_RATE_UNIT_INV ALID, CHARGE_RATE_UNIT_KM_ PER_H, CHARGE_RATE_UNIT_KM_ PER_MIN, CHARGE_RATE_UNIT_MIL ES_PER_H, CHARGE_RATE_UNIT_MIL ES_PER_MIN
charge_target_time: Estimated end time/date of current charge process. The car provides time and date in customerTime but backend will obtain UTC
charge_time_display: Indicates details of remaining charge time
charge_type: Informs about the charge type the car is connected to and used for charging. Possible values: CHARGE_TYPE_INVALID, CHARGE_TYPE_OFF, CHARGE_TYPE_AC, CHARGE_TYPE_DC
charging_mode: Possible values: CHARGING_MODE_INVAL ID, CHARGING_MODE_HOME STORAGECHARGING, CHARGING_MODE_EMER GENCY_SUPPLY, CHARGING_MODE_OFF_ GRID_OPERATION
charging_plug1_flap_lock_state: State of charging plug1 flap lock
charging_plug1_flap_state: State of the infra related to charging plug1 flap
charging_plug1_infrastructure_state: State of the infra related to charging plug1
charging_plug2_flap_lock_state: State of charging plug2 flap lock
charging_plug2_flap_state: State of the infra related to charging plug2 flap
charging_plug2_infrastructure_state: State of the infra related to charging plug2
charging_scenario: Informs about the actual charging scenario. States are also used for brand specific configurations at charging LED. Possible values: CHARGING_SCENARIO_I NVALID, CHARGING_SCENARIO_O FF, CHARGING_SCENARIO_C HARGING_TO_DEPARTUR E_TIME_FINISHED, CHARGING_SCENARIO_I MMEDIATELY_ CHARGING_FINISHED, CHARGING_SCENARIO_O PTIMISED_ CHARGING_FINISHED, CHARGING_SCENARIO_C HARGING_ TO_DEPARTURE_TIME_AC TIVE, CHARGING_SCENARIO_I MMEDIATELY_CHARGING _ACTIVE, CHARGING_SCENARIO_O PTIMISED_CHARGING_AC
charging_state: Indicates the state of charging with invalid, unsupported, off, charching, completed, error, conservationCharging
charging_state_error_code: Error code will be set here in case of an error with charging state
clima_option: if the parameter is true, the timer is programmed for AC and WindowHeating+Mirrors (WindowHeating+Mirrors, If the customer has bought FoD features / package 2 AND is_mirror_heating_enable d=true). The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "timers" & "clima option". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
climate_error_code: the state represents an aborted situation, which avoid start AC. The customer must not be informed with a popup/notification in this situation
cruising_range_combined: Combined available range for primary and secondary engine in kilometer
cruising_range_primary_engine: Available range for primary engine in kilometer
cruising_range_secondary_engine: Available range for secondary engine in kilometer
cso_v1_drivingenvironment_outdoorTempera: This topic contains the outdoor temperature in Kelvin
cso_v1_drivingenvironment_roadattributes: Streetclass vehicle is currently on. Please note: Usage of this topic might lead to license and liability restrictions
cso_v1_vehicle_body_exterior_lights_high: indicates if the specified light is on
cso_v1_vehicle_body_exterior_lights_lowb: indicates if the specified light is on
cso_v1_vehicle_tripstatistics_total_mile: This topic contains the total traveled distance of the vehicle in km.
current_charge_state: Possible values: CHARGE_STATE_INVALID, CHARGE_STATE_NOT_RE ADY_FOR_CHARGING, CHARGE_STATE_READY_F OR_CHARGING, CHARGE_STATE_CHARGI NG_HV_BATTERY, CHARGE_STATE_DISCHA RGING, CHARGE_STATE_CHARGE _PURPOSE_REACHED_AN D_NOT_CONSERVATION_ CHARGING, CHARGE_STATE_CHARGE _PURPOSE_REACHED_AN D_CONSERVATION, CHARGE_STATE_CONSER VATION_CHARGING, CHARGE_STATE_CHARGI NG_ERROR
current_value: Contains the current active value. Additional properties defining this property are contained in this resource. Definition for values referenced from the properties "dueInDistance" or "dueInTime": - Positive values shall be used for the distance or time UNTIL the vehicle maintenance due-date. - Negative values shall be used for the distance or time FOR the vehicle maintenance duedate.. The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.current value". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
data: Container that carries the raw data. TLV Encoded
data_filter_hash: Unique hash for identifying latest datafilter configuration in the backend
departure_date_time: The timer will be programmed for the corresponding date and time. SCME provides the time (departureDate>Examp le: 2005-11-12) and date (departureTime: 00:00:00+00:00) but java will forward this date-time in UTC. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "timers" & "single.departure date time". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
distance_unit: The enum value of "long trip distance unit"
dwa_active_state: The enum value of "dwa active state"
dwa_alarm_reason: The enum value of "dwa alarm reason"
dwa_alarm_state: The enum value of "dwa alarm state"
echo: TSS always creates a fixed value of echo every time a report is received
electric_engine_consumption_unit: The enum value of "long trip electric engine consumption unit"
end_time: to set the end time - from 00:00 to 00:00/24:00 (For example: 00:00). SCME uses 01:00:30+00:00 format (read viwi definition for time) and customerTime reference but java service must send in UTC and without seconds 00:00 and timezone(intrumentClust erTime has the timezone, if the frontends need the timezone). The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "preferred charging times" & "end time". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
energy_amount_max_soc: Amount of Energy necessary to charge to the maxSoc
energy_amount_min_soc: Amount of Energy necessary to charge to minSoc of profile (ChargingManagementExt ended.chargingProfiles[]. minSoc)
energy_amount_target_soc: Amount of Energy necessary to charge to the current targetSoc
engine_type: ENGINE_TYPE_INVALID, ENGINE_TYPE_GAS_CNG, ENGINE_TYPE_GAS_LPG, ENGINE_TYPE_PETROL_DI ESEL, ENGINE_TYPE_PETROL_G ASOLINE, ENGINE_TYPE_TYPE_IS_E LECTRIC, ENGINE_TYPE_TYPE_IS_G AS, ENGINE_TYPE_TYPE_IS_P ETROL, ENGINE_TYPE_UNSUPPO RTED. The values of: "battery state report.cruising ranges" & "engine type". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
error_code: error=1 if one parameter has invalid/unknown value (for example: temperature=3000ï¿½C in the car). error=2 time out in the car (for example: service temperature is not available)
estimated_finish_time: expectation when the timer will be finished. The SCME uses customerTime (Service Time-> customeTime) but java service must send in UTC time
estimated_start_time: expectation when the timer will be started. The SCME uses customerTime (Service Time-> customeTime) but java service must send in UTC time
first_active_consumer_: This TSS-ID is only interpreted by zFDI for vehicles of PPE platform!
flap_error_state: Contains details of flap error state
flap_lock_state: FLAP_LOCK_STATE_INVAL ID, FLAP_LOCK_STATE_LOCK ED, FLAP_LOCK_STATE_UNLO CKED, FLAP_LOCK_STATE_ERRO R. The values of: "plug states" & "flap lock state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
fogLightFrontIndication: current state of front fog light
fogLightRearIndication: current state of rear fog light
fuel_consumption_unit: The enum value of "long trip fuel consumption unit"
fuel_level: The int value of "fuel level fuel level"
fuel_level__accuracy: Indicates if fuel level is measured (0) or calculated (1)
gas_consumption_unit: The enum value of "long trip gas consumption unit"
highBeamFrontIndication: current state of high beam front
history_active_warnings_in_instrument_cl: Historical information about the warning lights being actived in the instrument cluster (001)
Historical information about the warning lights being actived in the instrument cluster (FFF)
home_storage_charging: The boolean value of "charge mode selection options home storage charging"
hv_soc: Indicates the state of charge for the high voltage battery
id: identification number for the preferred_charging_time. (Profile1: 1,2,3,4 ......... Profile5: 17,18,19,20). The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "preferred charging times" & "ID". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
immediate_action_state: IMMEDIATE_ACTION_STAT E_INVALID, IMMEDIATE_ACTION_STAT E_IMMEDIATE_ACTION_TI ME, IMMEDIATE_ACTION_STAT E_IMMEDIATE_CHARGING , IMMEDIATE_ACTION_STAT E_IMMEDIATE_ACTION_ST OPPED, IMMEDIATE_ACTION_STAT E_IMMEDIATE_ACTION_R ANGE, IMMEDIATE_ACTION_STAT E_IMMEDIATE_ACTION_S OC, IMMEDIATE_ACTION_STAT E_CHARGE_MODE_SELEC TION
immediate_charging: The boolean value of "charge mode selection options immediate charging"
immediate_discharging: The boolean value of "charge mode selection options immediate discharging"
infrastructure_state: INFRASTRUCTURE_STATE _INVALID, INFRASTRUCTURE_STATE _UNAVAILABLE, INFRASTRUCTURE_STATE _READY, INFRASTRUCTURE_STATE _ACTIVE. The values of: "plug states" & "infrastructure state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
instrument_cluster_time: Format for the DP (mqtt publish)-> 2009-01- 01T12:00:00+01:00 (without miliseconds. Java service must use 00 seconds, if SCME doesnï¿½t provide the seconds. Java must compare UTC time with instrument_cluster_time, if SCME has not provide timezone. Java must send the timezone in the ICT). The instrument_cluster_time (time adjusted in the car) = customeTime in the Service_Time. The frontends can use this time to represent the timers and preferredcharging in the time zone, which the car is using.
interior_climatization_consumption: Interior climatization consumption for a given driving mode (comfort- related).
is_activated: to activate o deactivate the corresponding preferred_charging_time. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "preferred charging times" & "is activated". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
is_actuationS_activated: The boolean value of "is actuationS activated"
is_engine_activated: The boolean value of "is engine activated"
is_enginestate_activated: The boolean value of "is enginestate activated"
is_mileage_activated: The boolean value of "is mileage activated"
is_set: The values of: "windows" & "is set". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "windows" & "is set". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
is_single_request: The boolean value of "is single request"
last_battery_charger_update_trigger: Contains trigger info about last battery charger update
lock_state: PLUG_LOCK_STATE_INVA LID, PLUG_LOCK_STATE_UNL OCKED, PLUG_LOCK_STATE_LOC KED, PLUG_LOCK_STATE_ERR OR. The values of: "plug states" & "lock state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
locked: The values of: "doors" & "locked". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "doors" & "locked". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
locked_state__rear_left_door: Indicates if the rear left door is locked (2) or unlocked (3)
locked_state_front_engine_bonnet: Indicates if the engine bonnet is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or locked (2) or unlocked (3)
locked_state_front_left_door: Indicates if the front left door is locked (2) or unlocked (3)
locked_state_front_right_door: Indicates if the front right door is locked (2) or unlocked (3)
locked_state_rear_right_door: Indicates if the rear right door is locked (2) or unlocked (3)
locked_state_tailgate: Indicates if the tailgate is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or locked (2) or unlocked (3)
longTermAverageSecondaryEngineConsumptio: long term average secondary engine consumption
long_term_data_average_aux_consumer_cons: Average Auxiliary Consumer Consumption during long term trip
long_term_data_average_electr_engine_con: Average Electric Engine Consumption during long term trip
long_term_data_average_fuel_consumption: Average Fuel Consumption during long term trip
long_term_data_average_gas_consumption: Average gas Consumption during long term trip
long_term_data_average_recuperation: Average recuperation during long term trip
long_term_data_mileage: Overall Mileage for long term trips
long_term_data_range_gain_distance: Gained range distance in [0.1 km] during long term trip
long_term_data_travel_time: Time of trip with vehicle ready for driving
long_term_data_zero_emission_distance: Distance driven without emission in [0,1km] during long term trip
maintenance_interval__time_until_inspect: Indicates the time remaining until the next service; if this limit was exceeded, this value indicates the time that has passed since then.
maintenance_interval__time_until_oil_cha: Indicates the time remaining until the next oil service; if this limit was exceeded, this value indicates the time that has passed since then.
maintenance_interval_distance_until_insp: Indicates the remaining running distance until the next service; if this limit was exceeded, this value indicates the distance that has been driven since then (always in km).
maintenance_interval_distance_until_oil_: Indicates the remaining running distance until the next oil service; if this limit was exceeded, this value indicates the distance that has been driven since then (in each case in kilometers).
maintenance_interval_inspection_warning: Indicates if the inspection warning is active in the vehicle
maintenance_interval_monthly_mileage: Indicates the distance driven monthly in kilometer
maintenance_interval_oil_change_warning: Indicates if the oil change warning is active in the vehicle
max_charge_current: maxCurrent. Charge with low current or high current. This maxcurrent will be used when charging is started by timer and only by the timers under this profile. Possible values: MAX_CHARGE_CURRENT _INVALID , MAX_CHARGE_CURRENT _MAX , MAX_CHARGE_CURRENT _REDUCED ,. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "max charge current". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
max_number_users: The int value of "max number users"
max_temperature: Current temperature value of the battery module with the highest temperature in ï¿½C.
max_value: The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.max value". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.max value". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
measurement_state: Possible values: MEASUREMENT_STATE_IN VALID, MEASUREMENT_STATE_U NSUPPORTED, MEASUREMENT_STATE_V ALID
message_received_timestamp: The string value of "long trip message received timestamp"
mileage: Mileage of the vehicle as W3C/#unsignedInt
mileage_state: The values of: "speed" & "mileage with unit.mileage state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "speed" & "mileage with unit.mileage state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
mileage_unit: The enum value of "long trip mileage unit"
min_temperature: Current temperature value of the battery module with the lowest temperature in ï¿½C.
min_value: The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.min value". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.min value". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
minimum_soc: minimun_soc. The min. charge level, which the customer want, that the battery reach. 0-10-20-30- 40-50. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "minimum soc". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
mode_information: Possible values: INFORMATION_INVALID, INFORMATION_DISCHAR GING_ACTIVE, INFORMATION_DISCHAR GING_STOPPED, INFORMATION_HOME_ST ORAGE_CHARGING_ACTI VE, INFORMATION_HOME_ST ORAGE_CHARGING_STOP PED, INFORMATION_EMERGEN CY_SUPPLY_ACTIVE, INFORMATION_EMERGEN CY_SUPPLY_STOPPED, INFORMATION_OFF_GRID _OPERATION_ACTIVE, INFORMATION_OFF_GRID _OPERATION_STOPPED, INFORMATION_DISCHAR GING_FINISHED_MIN_SO C, INFORMATION_BIDI_AVAI LABLE_NO_PROFILE, INFORMATION_BIDI_NOT _POSSIBLE_MINSOC, INFORMATION_BIDI_NOT
nextChargingTimer: which timer is the nextChargingTimer (Profile1: 1,2,3 ......... Profile5: 13,14,15) Date- Time customeTime
oil_level_actual_level: Amount of current motoroil level in percentage
oil_level_additional_oil_level: Fix for a known vehicle issue, used to overwrite the actual level in case of failure
oil_level_min_warning: Indicates the minimum level of motoroil as 0 if current oil level still enough, 1 if warning
oil_level_status: Indicates if the oil level is valid (1), invalid (0) or unsupported (2)
oil_level_total_max: Amount of motoroil level in liter
only_own_current: The boolean value of "charge mode selection options only own current"
open: The values of: "windows" & "open". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "windows" & "open". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
open_state_front_engine_bonnet: Indicates if the engine bonnet is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or open (2) or closed (3)
open_state_front_left_door: Indicates if the front left door is open (2) or closed (3)
open_state_front_right_door: Indicates if the front right door is locked (2) or unlocked (3)
open_state_rear_left_door: Indicates if the rear left door is open(2) or closed (3)
open_state_rear_right_door: Indicates if the rear right door is locked (2) or unlocked (3)
open_state_tailgate: Indicates if the tailgate is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or open (2) or closed (3)
outdoor_temperature: The float value of "outdoor temperature outdoor temperature"
outside_temperature: Temperature outside the vehicle in deci-Kelvin
overall_Mileage: The int value of "long trip vehicle trip data overall Mileage"
overall_Mileage_unit: The enum value of "long trip vehicle trip data overall Mileage unit"
overall_mileage: The int value of "long trip overall mileage"
parking_brake: Indicates if the parking brake is inactive (0) or active (1)
parking_light_left: The boolean value of "parkinglightstate parking light left"
parking_light_right: The boolean value of "parkinglightstate parking light right"
parking_lights: Indicates if parking lights are unsupported (0), invalid (1), off (2), left (3), right (4) or both (5)
percent_open: The values of: "windows" & "percent open". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "windows" & "percent open". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
physical_value: The float value of "slope consumption values descent slope consumption physical value"
plug_connection_state: PLUG_CONNECTION_STA TE_INVALID, PLUG_CONNECTION_STA TE_CONNECTED, PLUG_CONNECTION_STA TE_DISCONNECTED. The values of: "plug states" & "plug connection state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
plug_position: PLUGPOSITION_INVALID, PLUGPOSITION_FRONTLE FT1, PLUGPOSITION_FRONTLE FT2, PLUGPOSITION_FRONTRI GHT1, PLUGPOSITION_FRONTRI GHT2, PLUGPOSITION_REARLEF T1, PLUGPOSITION_REARLEF T2, PLUGPOSITION_REARRIG HT1, PLUGPOSITION_REARRIG HT2, PLUGPOSITION_FRONT. The values of: "plug states" & "plug position". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
plug_state: Indicates state of the charge plug
position: The values of: "windows" & "position". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "windows" & "position". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
position_front_left_door_window_lifter: Indicates the position of the front left door window lifter is open in percentage or closed (0)
position_front_right_door_window_lifter: Indicates if the position of the front right door window lifter is open in percentage or closed (0)
position_of_hood: Indicates the position of the car hood in percentage and (0) for closed
position_rear_left_door_window_lifter: Indicates if the position of the rear left door window lifter is open in percentage or closed (0)
position_rear_right_door_window_lifter: Indicates if the position of the rear right door window lifter is open in percentage or closed (0)
position_service_hatch: Indicates the position of the service hatch in percentage and (0) for closed
position_spoiler: Indicates the position of the spoiler in percentage and (0) for closed
position_sunroof_motor_hood_1: Indicates the position of the sunroof motor hood 1 in percentage and (0) for closed
position_sunroof_motor_hood_3: Indicates the position of the sunroof motor hood 3 in percentage and (0) for closed
preferred_charging_enabled: if the preferred charging timers for the corresponding profile are activated/deactivated. For the timers of the corresponding profiles. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile options.preferred charging enabled". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
preferred_charging_times: The boolean value of "charge mode selection options preferred charging times"
primaryEngineFuelLevelSensorStateIndicat: current state of primary engine fuel level sensor
primaryEngineMaxOutputPowerIndication: maximum power output of the engine
profile_charge_reason: The property informs about the specific reason why the charging process ist currently running when a profile is active. An profile is active when chargeMode is "immediatly profile" or "extended profile. Possible values: PROFILE_CHARGE_REAS ON_INVALID, PROFILE_CHARGE_REAS ON_MIN_SOC, PROFILE_CHARGE_REAS ON_MAX_SOC, PROFILE_CHARGE_REAS ON_OWN_CURRENT, PROFILE_CHARGE_REAS ON_SMART_CHARGING, PROFILE_CHARGE_REAS ON_LOW_COST
profile_id: identification number for the preferred_charging_time. (Profile1: 1,2,3,4 ......... Profile5: 17,18,19,20). The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile ID". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
profile_name: the name of the corresponding profile. For example: "House_charging_SOC_10 0" "PetrolStation". The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile name". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
profile_type: Possible values: PROFILE_TYPE_INVALID , PROFILE_TYPE_LOCATIO N_INDEPENDENT , PROFILE_TYPE_LOCATIO N_BASED , PROFILE_TYPE_NAVIGATI ON_BASED. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile type". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
profile_uuid: identification number for the preferred_charging_time. (Profile1: 1,2,3,4 ......... Profile5: 17,18,19,20). The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile uuid". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
radio/media - Album: information about music played in vehicle (Name of album)
radio/media - Artist: information about music played in vehicle (Artist)
radio/media - Song Title: information about music played in vehicle (Title of the song)
range: The values of: "battery state report.cruising ranges" & "range". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "battery state report.cruising ranges" & "range". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
rearRow1SystemActivationSwitch: current state of rear system activation
reason: The enum value of "long trip vehicle trip data reason"
remaining_charging_time_bulk: The string value of "battery state report remaining charging time bulk"
remaining_charging_time_complete: The string value of "battery state report remaining charging time complete"
remaining_charging_time_target_soc: Charging time left to reach target state of charge
remaining_climate_time: how long the AC will started. Normally AC will 30 minutes started but it could be different value depend of target temperature, inside temperature, energy, .... IMPORTANT-> There is not countdown in STK. The information will provide after starting AC
remaining_climatisation_time: Remaining time for which climatisations will run
remaining_time_finished_unit: Unit of remaining time finished. Possible values: TIME_UNIT_UNDEFINED, TIME_UNIT_MILLISECOND S, TIME_UNIT_SECONDS, TIME_UNIT_MINUTES, TIME_UNIT_HOURS, TIME_UNIT_DAYS, TIME_UNIT_MONTHS, TIME_UNIT_YEARS
required_pressure: The values of: "tires" & "required pressure". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "tires" & "required pressure". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
reset_reason: The enum value of "long trip reset reason"
reset_timestamp: The string value of "short trip reset timestamp"
resetcounter: The int value of "long trip vehicle trip data resetcounter"
residual_consumption: Energy consumption for residual car network components for a given driving mode (non- comfort-related).
resolution: The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.resolution". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.resolution". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
restriction_reason: The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.restriction reason". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.restriction reason". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
safe: The values of: "doors" & "safe". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "doors" & "safe". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
safe_state_front_engine_bonnet: Indicates the state of the engine bonnet is unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or unsafe (3)
safe_state_front_right_door: Indicates the state of the front right door unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or safe (2) or unsafe (3)
safe_state_rear_left_door: Indicates the state of the rear left door unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or safe (2) or unsafe (3)
safe_state_rear_right_door: Indicates the state of the rear right door unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or safe (2) or unsafe (3)
safe_state_tailgate: Indicates the state of the tailgate unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or unsafe (3)
save_to_package_frequency: The int value of "save to package frequency"
scope_potential_total: This TSS-ID is only interpreted byÂ zFDIÂ for vehicles ofÂ PPEÂ platform!
scr_number_of_engine_starts: Number of engine starts for the vehicle <=13 number of restarts, ==14 driveability, ==15 no_driveability
scr_range: Range for SCR (Selective Catalytic Reduction) in km
second_active_consumer_: This TSS-ID is only interpreted by zFDI for vehicles of PPE platform!
second_energy_saving_hints_amount_: This TSS-ID is only interpreted by zFDI for vehicles of PPE platform!
secondaryEngineBatteryStateOfChargeIndic: secondary engine battery state of charge
secondaryEnginePowermeterIndication: relative expression of the current electric power including charge/recuperation information
send_package_frequency: The int value of "send package frequency"
service_key_data: The string value of "service key data"
service_key_data_state: Possible states of the ServiceKey VALID = 0; OUTDATED = 1; INVALID = 2;
service_type: Contains the type of vehicle service. Unique identifier of the element. SERVICE_TYPE_INSPECTI ON = 0; SERVICE_TYPE_OIL = 1;. The values of: "service maintenances" & "service type". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
setting_mirror_heating_enabled: Is glass surface heating active at the moment
setting_zone_enabled_front_left: Is extended conditioning in front left zone enabled
setting_zone_enabled_front_right: Is extended conditioning in front right zone enabled
setting_zone_enabled_rear_left: Is extended conditioning in rear left zone enabled
setting_zone_enabled_rear_left_second_: Is extended conditioning in rear left second zone enabled
setting_zone_enabled_rear_right: Is extended conditioning in rear right zone enabled
setting_zone_enabled_rear_right_second: Is extended conditioning in rear right second zone enabled
short_term_data_average_aux_consumer_con: Average Auxiliary Consumer Consumption during short term trip
short_term_data_average_electr_engine_co: Average Electric Engine Consumption during short term trip
short_term_data_average_fuel_consumption: Average Fuel Consumption during short term trip
short_term_data_average_gas_consumption: Average gas Consumption during short term trip
short_term_data_average_recuperation: Average recuperation during short term trip
short_term_data_mileage: Overall Mileage for short term trips
short_term_data_range_gain_distance: Gained range distance in [0.1 km] during short term trip
short_term_data_travel_time: Time of trip with vehicle ready for driving
short_term_data_zero_emission_distance: Distance driven without emission in [0,1km] during short term trip
smart_charging_enabled: battery will be charged and controlled in a more intelligent way depend of the tarif. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile options.smart charging enabled". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
soc: The int value of "battery state report soc"
speed_unit: The enum value of "long trip speed unit"
start_stop_action: Indicates the action related to charging
start_stop_modification: Contains the detail realted to start stop modification
start_time: to set the start time - from 00:00 to 00:00/24:00 UTC (For example: 00:00). SCME uses 01:00:30+00:00 format (read viwi definition for time) and customerTime reference but java service must send in UTC and without seconds 00:00 and timezone(intrumentClust erTime has the timezone, if the frontends need the timezone). The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "preferred charging times" & "start time". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
state: State of the information (valid/invalid); type ï¿½Stateï¿½ defined in ï¿½TTRVS_types_v1ï¿½. The values of: "windows" & "state". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
state_ext_cond_available_front_left: Is extended conditioning zone front left available in the vehicle
state_ext_cond_available_front_right: Is extended conditioning zone front right available in the vehicle
state_ext_cond_available_rear_left: Is extended conditioning zone rear left available in the vehicle
state_ext_cond_available_rear_left_secon: State of ext cond availability at rear left second
state_ext_cond_available_rear_right: Is extended conditioning zone rear right available in the vehicle
state_ext_cond_available_rear_right_seco: State of ext cond availability at rear right second
state_front_left_door_window_lifter: Indicates the state of the front left door window lifter is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_front_right_door_window_lifter: Indicates the state of the front right door window lifter is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_mirror_heating_active: Is glass surface heating active at the moment
state_of_charge: State of charge for vehicles with an electric battery in percentage
state_of_hood: Indicates the state of the car hood unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_rear_left_door_window_lifter: Indicates the state of the rear left door window lifter is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_rear_right_door_window_lifter: Indicates the state of the rear right door window lifter is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_service_hatch: Indicates the state of the service hatch unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_spoiler: Indicates the state of the spoiler unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_sunroof_motor_hood_1: Indicates the state of the sunroof motor hood 1 unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_sunroof_motor_hood_3: Indicates the state of the sunroof motor hood 3 unsupported (0) or invalid(1) or open (2) or closed (3)
state_zone_active_front_left: Status of extended conditioning in zone front left
state_zone_active_front_right: Status of extended conditioning in zone front right
state_zone_active_rear_left: Status of extended conditioning in zone rear left
state_zone_active_rear_left_second_: Depicts whether rear left second zone is active or not
state_zone_active_rear_right: Status of extended conditioning in zone rear right
state_zone_active_rear_right_second_: Depicts whether rear right second zone is active or not
tank_accuracy: Accuracy of the fuel level with 0 or 1
target_range: The charging will be completed in the defined range. Range from 0 to 1500 Km
target_reachability: Possible values: TARGET_REACHABILITY_I NVALID , TARGET_REACHABILITY_C ALCULATING , TARGET_REACHABILITY_R EACHABLE , TARGET_REACHABILITY_N OT_REACHABLE ,
target_soc: the desired SOC that the client wants to reach. Options: 50-60-70-80-90- 100. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "target soc". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
temperature: the value of the corresponding temperature. Resolution=0.1ï¿½C 0(- 46ï¿½C)- >1460(100ï¿½C)/ Resolution=0.25ï¿½F 1461(-51ï¿½F)- >2513ï¿½F(212ï¿½F)
third_active_consumer_: This TSS-ID is only interpreted by zFDI for vehicles of PPE platform!
third_energy_saving_hints_amount_: This TSS-ID is only interpreted by zFDI for vehicles of PPE platform!
time_to_live: The int value of "time to live"
timer_charging: The boolean value of "charge mode selection options timer charging"
timer_charging_climatization: The boolean value of "charge mode selection options timer charging climatization"
timer_id: identification number for the preferred_charging_time. (Profile1: 1,2,3,4 ......... Profile5: 17,18,19,20). The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "timers" & "timer ID". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
timer_uuid: identification number for the preferred_charging_time. (Profile1: 1,2,3,4 ......... Profile5: 17,18,19,20). The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "timers" & "timer uuid". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
timestamp: The string value of "long trip vehicle trip data timestamp"
trailer_consumption_offset_value: Consumption influence of the trailer. Vehicle always lets this field empty.
trailer_state: Specifies the trailer state. Vehicle always sets this field to TRAILER_STATE_UNKNO WN. Possible values: , TRAILER_STATE_UNKNO WN , TRAILER_STATE_ACTIVE , TRAILER_STATE_DEACTIV E
travel_time: The int value of "long trip trip data travel time"
trigger_type: Trigger of the call service. (ROA, ROA_HK, ROA_SK, ICL, ICL_HK, ICL_SK, USM, ROA_REMOTE, ICL_REMOTE)
trip_distance: The float value of "long trip trip data trip distance"
trip_distance_unit: The enum value of "long trip trip data trip distance unit"
trip_reset_id: The string value of "long trip trip reset ID"
tyre_pressure_actual_front_left: Indicates if the actual front left tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_actual_front_right: Indicates if the actual front right tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_actual_rear_left: Indicates if the actual rear left tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_actual_rear_right: Indicates if the actual rear left tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_actual_spare_tyre: Indicates if the actual spare tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_differential_front_left: Indicates if the differential front left tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_differential_front_right: Indicates if the differential front right tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_differential_rear_left: Indicates if the differential rear left tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_differential_rear_right: Indicates if the differential rear right tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_differential_spare_tyre: Indicates if the differential spare tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_required_front_left: Indicates if the required front left tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_required_front_right: Indicates if the required front right tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_required_rear_left: Indicates if the required rear left tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_required_rear_right: Indicates if the required rear left tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
tyre_pressure_required_spare_tyre: Indicates if the required spare tyre pressure is unsupported (0) or invalid (1) or valid (int)
unit: The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.unit". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.unit". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
universal_unique_id: The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.universal unique ID". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.. The values of: "service maintenances" & "due in distance.universal unique ID". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
update_reason: The reason why the report has been sent to the backend. Possible values: UPDATE_REASON_INVALI D, UPDATE_REASON_CHAR GING, UPDATE_REASON_CLAMP 15_OFF, UPDATE_REASON_CLAMP 15_ON, UPDATE_REASON_CLIMA TISATION, UPDATE_REASON_OTHER
use_external_service: In use in case customer can use the PV system or similar supplies. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile options.use external service". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
use_private_current_enabled: the parameter will be foward to the backend with a value but SCME ignores the parameter (the customer will not see effects in the car) although the parameter is adjustable in SCME. The values of: "profile state report.profiles" & "profile options.use private current enabled". Note that [*] in the key is replaced by a number.
value: The float value of "battery level HV battery level HV value"
value_type: The enum value of "energy contents maximal energy content value type"
vehicleTripDataType: The enum value of "long trip vehicle trip data vehicleTripDataType"
verification_uri_complete: The string value of "verification uri complete"
window_heating_error_code: the state represents an aborted situation, which avoid start AC. The customer must not be informed with a popup/notification in this situation
window_heating_state: Possible values: WINDOW_HEATING_STAT E_INVALID, WINDOW_HEATING_STAT E_OFF, WINDOW_HEATING_STAT E_ON
wireless_error_state_z_mover: Indicates error state of Z mover
